violations.description: Person in charge. — --- Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Crate of oranges on floor of walk-in cooler.--Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Multiple working containers in kitchen and walk-in cooler need to be dated and labeled.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Middle filters under hood are black with buildup and in need of cleaning.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open containers of food in freezer in food prep area.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed broken handle on Lipton cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food on inside of microwave.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration . -Sanitizer in ware washer was testing at 10ppm. COS
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
